test.create_query: CREATE TABLE ts_grid (id UInt16, timestamp DateTime, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, timestamp)
CREATE TABLE ts_grid_sparse (id UInt16, timestamp DateTime, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, timestamp)
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO ts_grid SELECT (number % 400)::UInt16 AS id, toDateTime(intDiv(number, 400) * 10) AS timestamp, (intDiv(number, 400) % 1000)::Float64 AS value FROM numbers_mt(400 * 10000)
INSERT INTO ts_grid_sparse SELECT (number % 400)::UInt16 AS id, toDateTime(intDiv(number, 400) * 100) AS timestamp, (intDiv(number, 400) % 1000)::Float64 AS value FROM numbers_mt(400 * 1000)
test.query: SELECT id, timeSeriesResampleToGridWithStaleness(0, 100000, 10, {window})(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesInstantRateToGrid(0, 100000, 10, {window})(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesInstantDeltaToGrid(0, 100000, 10, {window})(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesChangesToGrid(0, 100000, 10, {window})(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesResetsToGrid(0, 100000, 10, {window})(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesRateToGrid(0, 100000, 10, {window})(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesDeltaToGrid(0, 100000, 10, {window})(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesDerivToGrid(0, 100000, 10, {window})(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesPredictLinearToGrid(0, 100000, 10, {window}, 60)(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesResampleToGridWithStaleness(0, 100000, 10, 1000)(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid_sparse GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesDerivToGrid(0, 100000, 10, 1000)(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid_sparse GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
SELECT id, timeSeriesPredictLinearToGrid(0, 100000, 10, 1000, 60)(timestamp, value) FROM ts_grid_sparse GROUP BY id FORMAT Null
